name: Creamed Onions
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the onions.
2. Parboil in about 3/4 cup water (I do this part in a covered casserole in the microwave).
3. Make white sauce with the remaining ingredients: butter, flour, salt, and cream.
4. If you prefer a stronger onion flavor, thin the white sauce with some of the onion water. Otherwise, thin it with your choice of cream, milk, water, chicken broth, or any other desired liquid.
5. Add onions to the sauce and bake at 325°F to 350°F until bubbly.
